scripts.build-editor: npm run copy:readme && ng build editor
scripts.npm-publish-win: npm run build-editor && npm login && npm publish ./dist/editor/ --access=public && npm logout && echo "Published successfully. Use 'npm install [package-name]' in the project you want to use it."
scripts.bump-patch: npm version --git-tag-version=false patch > .ver && cd ./projects/editor && npm version --git-tag-version=false patch && git add package.json && cd ../.. && npm run build-install && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit --file=.ver && del /q .ver
scripts.bump-minor: npm version --git-tag-version=false minor > .ver && cd ./projects/editor && npm version --git-tag-version=false minor && git add package.json && cd ../.. && npm run build-install && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit --file=.ver && del /q .ver
scripts.bump-major: npm version --git-tag-version=false major > .ver && cd ./projects/editor && npm version --git-tag-version=false major && git add package.json && cd ../.. && npm run build-install && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit --file=.ver && del /q .ver
